subject: [PATCH v4 11/21] zswap: move zswap entry management to the virtual swap descriptor

2026-03-18.patch_summary: This patch moves the management of zswap entries from a dedicated tree to the virtual swap descriptor, eliminating lock contention between zswap and other swap operations. The zswap pool is re-partitioned by virtual swap cluster, allowing for more efficient use of memory. This change simplifies the code and improves performance by reducing synchronization overhead.
